reasons: Fresh Command Center recipe trace proves default, selected, and disabled passive observation policies through real CDP UI actions.
Fresh Companion recipe trace proves the supported Expo observeUi bridge path on simulator fs-3 after the app is launched.
The remaining Companion ui.press/observe:false parity gap is explicitly documented rather than hidden behind screenshots.
better_version_guidance: Add repo-supported Companion ui.press and observe:false recipe actions if React Native UI-action parity becomes part of the acceptance bar.
Make bridge recipes launch the companion app automatically, not only warm Metro and the simulator.

coverage.reason: recipe-coverage.md maps the Command Center policy proof and Companion bridge proof to concrete trace artifacts.

evidence.reason: Trace/output, not screenshots, proves the passive observation behavior requested for this pass.

flow.reason: Companion currently validates observeUi through app.status; it does not expose ui.press/observe:false parity actions.

contextual_findings.message: Companion recipe coverage cannot yet mirror the Command Center ui.press observe matrix because its manifest does not expose ui.press, ui.wait_for, ui.screenshot, or observer declarations.

suggested_recipe_delta: Add a Companion recipe that exercises ui.press default observe, selected observe refs, and observe:false once those actions are supported.

good_patterns: Worktree-local runner for unmerged recipe runner changes
Dedicated simulator fs-3 for Companion validation
anti_patterns: Warm Metro-only prepare when the recipe bridge requires a running app
Listing local artifact paths as PR evidence
